validation.invalid_email: Please enter a valid email address
validation.invalid_password: Password must be at least 8 characters long
validation.invalid_name: Name  must be at least 3 characters long
validation.invalid_last_name: Last name  must be at least 3 characters long
validation.invalid_otp: Please enter a valid verification code

account_created.title: Account created
account_created.content: Welcome to Reclaim. In a moment you will receive an email to verify your account.

callback_url_required.title: Redirect needed
callback_url_required.content: A redirect destination is required to continue.

credential_account_not_found.title: Account not linked
credential_account_not_found.content: We couldn’t find a linked account for this action.

cross_site_navigation_login_blocked.title: Action blocked
cross_site_navigation_login_blocked.content: This request couldn’t be completed for security reasons.

email_already_verified.title: Email already verified
email_already_verified.content: Thanks for confirming your reclaim account. You're all set to continue.

email_can_not_be_updated.title: Email can’t be updated
email_can_not_be_updated.content: This email can’t be updated right now.

email_mismatch.title: Email mismatch
email_mismatch.content: The email doesn’t match the one we expected.

email_not_verified.title: Email not verified
email_not_verified.content: It looks like your email has not been verified yet. Don’t worry, we’ll send you another email.

failed_to_create_session.title: Session not started
failed_to_create_session.content: We couldn’t start your session. Please try again.

failed_to_create_user.title: Account not created
failed_to_create_user.content: Something went wrong while creating your account. Let’s try again.

failed_to_create_verification.title: Verification failed
failed_to_create_verification.content: We couldn’t send the verification email. Try again in a moment.

failed_to_get_session.title: Session expired
failed_to_get_session.content: Your session has expired. Please sign in again to continue.

failed_to_get_user_info.title: Couldn’t load account
failed_to_get_user_info.content: We couldn’t load your account details. Please try again.

failed_to_unlink_last_account.title: Action not allowed
failed_to_unlink_last_account.content: You need at least one sign-in method linked to your account.

failed_to_update_user.title: Changes not saved
failed_to_update_user.content: We couldn’t save your changes. Give it another try.

field_not_allowed.title: Field not allowed
field_not_allowed.content: One of the provided fields isn’t allowed.

image-size.title: Image too large
image-size.content: Your image needs to be under 5MB to keep things smooth and speedy.

image-type.title: Invalid image
image-type.content: Looks like that’s not an image we can use. Please upload a valid one so we can work with it.

invalid_email_or_password.title: Check your details
invalid_email_or_password.content: Your credentials details need another look

invalid_email.title: Invalid email
invalid_email.content: That email doesn’t look quite right. Check and try again.

invalid_origin.title: Invalid request
invalid_origin.content: This request came from an invalid source.

invalid_otp.title: Invalid code
invalid_otp.content: It looks like this verification code can’t be used. Try requesting a new one.

invalid_password.title: Check your details
invalid_password.content: Your credentials details need another look

invalid_token.title: Invalid token
invalid_token.content: It looks like this verification code can’t be used. Try requesting a new one.

linked_account_already_exists.title: Account already linked
linked_account_already_exists.content: It looks like this account is already linked.

missing_or_null_origin.title: Invalid request
missing_or_null_origin.content: This request is missing required security information.

no-params.title: Missing parameters
no-params.content: Ops, this need some params to work properly

otp_expired.title: Code expired
otp_expired.content: It looks like this verification code has expired. Try requesting a new one.

otp_resend.title: Code on the way
otp_resend.content: A fresh verification code is on its way to your inbox.

password_changed.title: Password updated
password_changed.content: Password changed successfully. Let’s keep going ✨

password_mismatch.title: Passwords don’t match
password_mismatch.content: hmm... your password didn't match. Let's try again.

password_too_long.title: Password too long
password_too_long.content: Your password is a bit too long. Try shortening it.

password_too_short.title: Password too short
password_too_short.content: Your password is a bit too short. Add a few more characters.

provider_not_found.title: Option not available
provider_not_found.content: This sign-in option isn’t available right now.

session_expired.title: Session expired
session_expired.content: Your session has expired. Please sign in again to continue.

session_not_fresh.title: Session needs refresh
session_not_fresh.content: For your security, please sign in again to continue.

social_account_already_linked.title: Account already linked
social_account_already_linked.content: This social account is already linked.

unknown_error.title: Something went wrong
unknown_error.content: Hmm... something unexpected happened. Don’t worry, we’re on it.

user_already_exists_use_another_email.title: Email already in use
user_already_exists_use_another_email.content: Looks like you're already part of our community. Try using another email.

user_already_exists.title: Account already exists
user_already_exists.content: Looks like you're already part of our community

user_already_has_password.title: Password already set
user_already_has_password.content: This account already has a password set. Use it to continue.

user_email_not_found.title: No account found
user_email_not_found.content: It looks like you don't have an account yet. Sign up instead.

verification_email_not_enabled.title: Verification not available
verification_email_not_enabled.content: Email verification isn’t enabled for this account.

unauthorized.title: Action not allowed
unauthorized.content: It appears that you are not authorized to perform this action. Please try again.

loading.title: Just a moment
loading.description: We are organizing some things for you

file_picker.select_file: Select an image from your device
file_picker.no_file_selected: No image selected, please select one

marketing.title: Reclaim — Revenue recovery for modern SaaS
marketing.description: Automatically detect, retry, and recover failed payments. Built for Spanish-speaking content creators and SaaS businesses.

sign_up.title: Recover it. Keep it.
sign_up.description: Recover failed payments before they become lost customers.

verify_email.title: Welcome to Reclaim
verify_email.intro: Recover revenue. Reduce churn. Keep growth moving. ✨
verify_email.body: Reclaim helps you automatically recover failed payments, reduce involuntary churn, and keep your subscriptions flowing without adding friction to your customers.
verify_email.description: Before you get started, there’s just one quick step left:
verify_email.text_token_link: Verify your email to activate your account.
verify_email.explanation: Once verified, you’ll be ready to connect your billing stack, automate recovery workflows, and start reclaiming lost revenue in real time.
verify_email.disclaimer: If you didn’t create this account, you can safely ignore this message.

metadata.title: Get Started
metadata.description: Get started with Reclaim - the SaaS solution for recovering failed payments.

sign_in.title: Track it. Grow it.
sign_in.description: Sign in to monitor recoveries, revenue, and subscription health.

metadata.title: Sign In
metadata.description: Sign in to your Reclaim account and start recovering failed payments.

forgot_password.title: Reset it. Stay secure.
forgot_password.description: A new password is all it takes to keep going with confidence and security.

opt_code.label: Enter your verification code here
opt_code.placeholder: This code was sent to your email

forgot_password.navigate: If you not sure, let’s go back.
forgot_password.time-out: Your time to enter the code has ended.

enter-email.title: Enter your email
enter-email.subtitle: Enter the email linked to your Reclaim account

enter-code.title: Check your inbox
enter-code.subtitle: We’ve sent you a verification code to confirm it’s you

reset-password.title: Set your password
reset-password.subtitle: Set and confirm your new password to continue

reset_email.title: Reset your password
reset_email.body: Use the one-time verification code below to continue securely.
reset_email.disclaimer: If you didn’t request this password reset, you can safely ignore this email. Your account remains protected.

metadata.title: Forgot Password
metadata.description: Forgot your password? Don't worry, we got you.

onboarding.title: Onboarding
onboarding.description: Everything you need to recover and retain recurring revenue.
